title: Pagan Love
writer: Achmed Abdullah, Hugo Ballin, George S. Hellman
actors: Tôgô Yamamoto, Mabel Ballin, Rockliffe Fellowes
plot: Tsing Yu-Ch'ing, a young Chinese, is sent to the U.S. from his native land to study Western civilization and carry on work for his government. After attending an American university, Tsing starts a Chinese newspaper in New York Ci...
